_status: MEASURED-exploratory. covered_count = n_checkable_C5_n1 from registry/assessments/b-cov-define-lane.json (mapper-parse lane, kappa_B_engine=0 on all 7). census_mode=exhaustive: every item of each listed benchmark slice was classified by the deterministic mapper-lane instrument, so the finite-suite kappa is EXACT conditional on the instrument (no sampling interval); label_fn_ub=0.0 is licensed ONLY because the classifier is deterministic code, not human annotation — the ORACLE (gold-parse + best-endorsement) census will require a registered nonzero label_fn_ub from adjudicated double-annotation (POWER.md §2.1). coverage_lane=mapper-parse: even a numerically-firing kill would be CONTINGENT on the oracle census. correct_cov/n_cov omitted (no covered items exist): the rig imputes the distribution-free a_cov=0 (review blocking finding 2 — never chance). No census pin block and no registered family eligibility: this input can ONLY produce an ILLUSTRATIVE-ONLY run, never a G1 verdict (review: the live define-lane kill is withdrawn).
